title: Farm Animals Toys, Mini Size Animals Figurines Set with Assemble Fence Farmers Trees Plants Pools, Realistic Plastic Farmyard Toys Gifts for Kids Toddler Boys Girls
features: Realistic Farm Animals Toys Accessories : With 15 pcs toy animals figures and 5pcs farmer, 4pcs assembly fence, 3pcs plants, 2pcs trees, 1pcs pool. Farm toys with realistic looking and fine detail, like real animals, children can better to observe animals.
Different Size Animals Toys for Kids : mini size. farm animals: cow, pig, dog, donkey, sheep, cat, goose, duck, rooster, horse(about 2.5 - 1.14 inchs / 3cm-6cm ).
DIY Toy Farm Fence : Height: 4 cm. The reusable fences are easy to assemble and disassemble. Assemble multiple/differently shaped fences to place farm animals set in different areas.

Farmyard Educational Toy : Kids can learn about different animals while playing animals toy playset. Discuss with parents or friends, exercise communication skills, imagination and hand-eye coordination.
Multifunctional Farm Animal Figures for Toddlers : No only an educational toy, but also a cakes and home decor, exhibitions and collectibles.
